title: Advanced Track Showcase Game
genericDescription: Prepare a track piece for public critique; synthesize advanced methods; evaluate audience interpretation.
specificDescription: Build a refined game suitable for a public showcase, research demo, gallery critique, or AI design review. Conduct at least five playtests and summarize interpretive patterns.
gradingRubric: 30 pts final work quality; 20 pts track mastery; 20 pts audience research; 15 pts polish; 15 pts presentation.
